//: Recurring data jobs for ops/harvest/runner.mjs. every: day|week|month|once. Commands run from the repo root with .env.local via each job's own --env-file. Set "disabled": true to park a job without deleting it. MRF manifests don't go here — drop them in .harvest/mrf/manifests/queue/ instead.

jobs.memo: Writes yesterday's lead_reports row from git log, docs/reports, sql/, sync_runs and corpus row counts. No LLM. FIRST on purpose: it counts rows to measure yesterday's growth, so it must read the database BEFORE tonight's loads start adding to it — running it last would bill tonight's rows to yesterday. Base tables only, so it does not care that the matview rebuild comes later in the pass. Never overwrites a row a human has edited; an existing row is a clean skip, not a failure.
Read-only morning coverage report — the log is the deliverable.

Directory-side coverage snapshot. RE-ENABLED 2026-07-18: status.mjs now runs every query through a psql subprocess (no undici 300s ceiling, the NYS-65 family) and the per-payer aggregate's count(p.*)->count(p.id) fix cut it from ~7min to ~10s. Full run ~10s.
Discover, download, and apply the CMS weekly NPPES delta + deactivations. nppes-sync.mjs skips already-applied files, so re-running is free.
Read-only capability probe (<=2 GETs per payer) — keeps payer_sources.last_probe_result honest.
Regenerate docs/data/DATABASE.md + Obsidian atlas from the live schema.
